description_long: This bungalow features a large, thatched hip roof extending over a spacious wooden structure with open sides and a prominent front porch. The front of the building opens directly onto a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by a stone or tile deck and surrounded by a grassy yard. The wooden railings and posts support the roof, and the open design suggests a tropical or resort-style dwelling. The windows are arranged in a continuous band along the sides, providing ample natural light and ventilation. The structure sits on a raised platform, with the pool integrated into the landscape. The overall appearance is inviting and designed for relaxation, blending natural materials with open-air living.
description: A tropical-style wooden bungalow with a large thatched hip roof, open front porch, and a rectangular swimming pool set in a grassy yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open porch, wooden posts, and the swimming pool directly in front of the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long thatched roof, continuous band of windows, and the pool running parallel to the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the hip roof and the back porch area, with windows visible along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool adjacent to the bungalow and the extended roof covering the side porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: continuous band of side and rear windows
